selectInstanceModal.title: Select Instance
selectInstanceModal.emptyHint: Go to Instance Management to create or import your first game environment
selectInstanceModal.searchPlaceholder: Search title, Loader, or MC version...

noAccount.title: Cannot Launch Instance
noAccount.headline: No Game Account Detected
noAccount.description:
Launching Minecraft requires at least one valid game account.
Please go to Settings to add a Microsoft account.

noInstance.title: Cannot Launch Game
noInstance.headline: No Instances Created
noInstance.description:
You need to create or import a game instance first.
Browse Resource Downloads for modpacks, or import from local files.

sidebar.transferConsoleHint: Click a trusted online device from the list on the left to transfer instances or saves across devices.
sidebar.trustRequestMessage: Device {{deviceName}} wants to establish LAN trust with you
sidebar.trustRequestHint: Once accepted, you can transfer game instances and saves between devices, and view each other's real-time game status. Make sure you recognize this device.

multiplayer.title: Multiplayer Hub
multiplayer.description: Community Server Directory and Terracotta Multiplayer.

zip.label: Standard ZIP
zip.desc: Maximum compatibility and full file bundling.

curseforge.label: CurseForge
curseforge.desc: Exports a CurseForge-style archive with manifest.json.

pipack.label: PiPack
pipack.desc: PiLauncher smart pack with mixed-source mod recovery.

manifest.title: MANIFEST MODE
manifest.primary: Prefer platform references over bundling mod files when the source can be resolved.
manifest.fallback: Mods without a recoverable platform reference stay inside the archive as fallbacks.
manifest.pipackLocked: PiPack always writes `pi_manifest.json` and only bundles mods that cannot be restored from their source platform.

modSnapshots.title: Mod Snapshot Timeline
modSnapshots.emptySelection: Select a snapshot from the left first.
modSnapshots.loadingDiff: Calculating differences from the previous snapshot...
modSnapshots.noChanges: No file-level changes compared with the previous snapshot.

summary.compareWithPrevious: Comparing the selected snapshot with the previous version.
summary.initialSnapshot: This is the earliest snapshot in history. The list below shows the recorded mod state.

messages.createFailed: Failed to create snapshot. Check the logs for details.
messages.historyLoadFailed: Failed to load snapshot history. Check the logs for details.
messages.rollbackSuccess: Rolled back to the selected snapshot.
messages.rollbackFailed: Failed to roll back snapshot. Check the logs for details.

descriptions.initialEnabled: This mod is first recorded in this snapshot.
descriptions.initialDisabled: This mod is first recorded in this snapshot and is disabled here.
descriptions.added: This mod first appears in the selected snapshot.
descriptions.removed: This mod exists in the previous snapshot but not in the selected snapshot.
descriptions.updated: The file content of this mod changed.

hero.verifyingDescription: Comparing the current instance against the backup snapshot for Minecraft version, loader, mods, and configs.
hero.defaultDescription: A guard backup of the current world will be created before the selected snapshot is restored.

strategy.primary: Create a guard backup for the current world before restoring the selected snapshot.

toggle.title: Restore Config Files Too
toggle.description: This replaces the current `config` and `defaultconfigs`. Enable it when you want a full rollback of both the world and configs.

warnings.title: Risks Detected
warnings.modEnvironmentDiffers: Mod environment differs: current {{current}} mods, backup {{backup}} mods.
warnings.configSnapshotDiffers: Config snapshot differs from the current instance. Enable config restore for a full rollback.
warnings.unsafeSnapshot: This snapshot was marked non-safe and may have been created while the world was active.

deviceName.label: Device Name
deviceName.description: Identifier used for LAN discovery and file transfer.

language.label: Launcher Language
language.description: Change the display language. Fully applied after restart.

checkUpdate.label: Check for Updates
checkUpdate.description: Check for new versions and install updates seamlessly within Tauri.

checkUpdateOnStart.label: Check Update on Start
checkUpdateOnStart.description: Automatically check for a new version every time you open the launcher.

performanceProfile.label: Performance Mode
performanceProfile.description: Battery Saver is recommended for low-power handhelds like Steam Deck. It reduces background, log, and download concurrency overhead.

preventTouchAction.label: Prevent Touch Action
preventTouchAction.description: Disable default web touch behaviors globally.

toggleFullscreen.label: Toggle Fullscreen
toggleFullscreen.description: Manually enter or exit fullscreen mode.

exitApp.label: Exit App
exitApp.description: Close PiLauncher totally. A prompt will be shown.

linuxDisableDmabuf.label: Linux Compatibility Mode (DMABUF)
linuxDisableDmabuf.description: Disables WebKit DMABUF renderer to fix flickering/black screen on some Linux distros (e.g. Kali). **Requires manual restart**.

resetSettings.label: Reset Settings
resetSettings.description: Restore launcher settings to default. Data won't be deleted.

exitConfirm.title: Confirm Exit
exitConfirm.headline: Exit PiLauncher
exitConfirm.description: Clicking confirm will exit the launcher immediately. Background tasks will stop.

resetConfirm.title: Reset Settings
resetConfirm.headline: Confirm Reset
resetConfirm.description: Settings will be reset. Data and instances will be kept.

java.autoDownloadDesc: Select version and provider, then download to runtime/Java locally.
java.autoDetectDesc: If enabled, scans on startup and automatically picks the best versions.
java.globalPathDesc: Default Java path used when mapped version isn't available.
java.memoryDesc: New instances inherit this global config by default unless customized.

memoryModeDescriptions.auto: Automatically calculates RAM allocation from the documented recommendation and safety limits.
memoryModeDescriptions.manual: Uses your requested target, but caps it to the current safe range when memory is tight.
memoryModeDescriptions.force: Ignores the safety limit and tries to honor your target. It can exceed the current available-memory hard limit, but still stays within device memory.

memoryWarnings.hardLimitBody: You requested {{requested}}, but the current hard limit is {{limit}}, so this run can only use {{effective}}.
memoryWarnings.safeLimitBody: You requested {{requested}}, but this run will be reduced to {{effective}} to keep within the safe limit ({{limit}}).
memoryWarnings.forceModeBody: Force mode ignores the safety limit and can exceed the current available-memory hard limit of {{limit}}. Make sure the system still has enough headroom.
memoryWarnings.manualModeBody: Manual mode prioritizes your requested {{requested}} and is currently expected to use {{effective}}. It will fall back to the safe range if available memory is tight.
memoryWarnings.autoModeBody: Auto mode uses min(recommended {{recommended}}, safe limit {{safeLimit}}), so this run is expected to use {{effective}}.

java.maxMemoryDesc: Dynamically adjust the maximum RAM for the game.
java.jvmArgsDesc: Advanced level. Applies to instances that inherit settings.

selector.notFound: No available Java detected. Please browse manually.
selector.deleteConfirmDesc: Only Java runtimes downloaded into runtime/java by the launcher can be deleted. External Java installations are never removed.

testDialog.title: Java Test
testDialog.missingPathDesc: Please choose an executable Java path before testing.
testDialog.failedDesc: The current path cannot be used as a Java runtime.

appearance.selectLocalInfo: Click to select a local image
appearance.bgBlurDesc: Adjust the blur level for the main background image.
appearance.panoramaEnabledDesc: Use effective panorama from base_path/config/background if available.
appearance.panoramaSpeedDesc: Rotation speed for panorama background. Set 0 to pause.
appearance.maskColorDesc: Overlay color on background to ensure text readability.
appearance.maskOpacityDesc: Overlay opacity. Higher value makes background darker.
appearance.fontFamilyDesc: Main font for launcher. Fallbacks to Minecraft font if not supported.
appearance.maskGradientDesc: Add a black gradient at bottom to improve text/nav readability.
appearance.showInstancesDesc: Show the Instances entry in the top navigation bar
appearance.showMultiplayerDesc: Show the Multiplayer entry in the top navigation bar
appearance.showDownloadsDesc: Show the Downloads entry in the top navigation bar
appearance.showLibraryDesc: Show the Library entry in the top navigation bar
appearance.skipExitConfirmDesc: Close the window without showing a confirmation dialog (only applies when close behavior is set to "Exit")

game.windowTitleDesc: Text displayed on the Minecraft game window titlebar.
game.fullscreenDesc: Enter exclusive fullscreen on game start.
game.showLogDesc: Expand console with logs during startup until loading is finished.
game.steamDeckKeymapDesc: Treat the Steam Input keyboard/mouse layout as controller navigation in the launcher, matching the recommended Minecraft Java layout.

steamDeckMap.mouseButtons: Right / left mouse click for Minecraft

game.visibilityDesc: Action after Minecraft instance is successfully launched.

keep.label: Keep Window Open
keep.desc: Launcher stays as is, convenient for logs or management.

minimize.label: Auto-Minimize to Tray
minimize.desc: Hide UI to save resources, auto-restore after game exit.

close.label: Close Launcher Directly
close.desc: Maximize performance, but requires manual restart later.

download.autoLatencyDesc: Test latency before downloading and pick the lowest one.
download.concurrencyDesc: Higher concurrency increases speed but consumes more CPU/RAM.
download.chunkedEnableDesc: Use multi-threaded downloads for large files that support Range.
download.chunkedThresholdDesc: Apply chunked downloading for files larger than this (MB).
download.timeoutDesc: Time before automatically interrupting and retrying.
download.retryDesc: Retry attempts when downloading a single file fails.
download.verifyHashDesc: Ensure file was not corrupted after downloaded.
download.proxyModeDesc: Affects downloads and APIs only, not game multi-player.
download.diagDesc: Check core domains accessibility, including DNS, TCP, TLS and HTTP.
download.scanQr: Scan QR Code\nTo get Base64 report
download.clickToTest: Click the button to test network status

account.noMcTip: Don't own Minecraft? Get it securely from official stores
account.delConfirmDesc: Are you sure? This only removes identity from launcher, \nwill NOT delete local save data.

card.noteMicrosoft: Identity and avatar will sync automatically.
card.noteAuthlib: Uses a custom skin server authentication service.

microsoft.title: Microsoft Account Login
microsoft.requesting: Requesting a secure code from Microsoft...
microsoft.hint: Scan the QR code below to open the verification page, or copy the code and continue in your browser.
microsoft.polling: Waiting for authorization and token exchange in the background. Do not close this dialog...

offline.rule: Rules: 3-16 characters, letters, numbers, and underscores only.
offline.warningLine1: Renaming will also change the linked UUID.
offline.warningLine2: Single-player saves and offline servers will identify you as a new player, so old inventory and progress will not carry over directly.

errors.invalidName: Invalid username. Use 3-16 letters, numbers, or underscores only.
errors.duplicateName: This game ID already exists. Choose another name.

authlib.title: Third-party Skin Server Login
authlib.hint: Use a skin server API compatible with authlib-injector / Yggdrasil. Enter the API root provided by the skin server, such as https://example.com/api/yggdrasil.

errors.missingApiRoot: Enter the third-party skin server Yggdrasil API URL.

telemetryUpload.label: Upload installation telemetry
telemetryUpload.description: Enabled by default. PiLauncher uploads at most once every 3 days, including only installation ID, platform, memory capacity, GPU name, launcher version, and first install time for install-count analysis and compatibility testing.

data.currentLoc: Current: {{path}}\nMigrate all settings, logs, games to a new folder.
data.renameDirDesc: Rename the current data folder to distinguish it from others.
data.cleanLogsDesc: Empty all logs from logs/ directory to free space. Currently at: {{path}}
data.removeConfirmHeadline: Are you sure to remove this linked dir?
data.removeConfirmDesc1: This action unlinks the dir and cleans up related cache in PiLauncher.
data.removeConfirmDesc2: Original files will not be touched.
data.cleanLogsConfirmTitle: This will delete all log files under logs/ directory.
data.renameModalDesc: Launcher will restart after a successful rename.
data.thirdPartyListDesc1: Scanned during startup. Removal doesn't delete local data.
data.thirdPartyListDesc2: These external folders are managed by PiLauncher too.
data.removedCountSuccess: Unlinked and cleaned {{count}} related imported instance data.
data.migrateConfirm:
Would you like to move all game data (instances, configs, etc.) from the current directory to the new one?

Select [Yes] to move all data.
Select [No] to only copy the basic configuration file (settings.json), keeping old data.
data.migrateSuccess: Data directory migration successful! To ensure normal game operation, PiLauncher will exit. Please restart the launcher.
data.renameSuccess: Rename successful! To ensure everything is normal, the launcher will exit. Please restart.

remoteLogs.title: Remote Log History
remoteLogs.description: View logs uploaded to LogShare.CN and remove remote logs with saved delete tokens.
remoteLogs.deleteDesc: Deletion uses the locally saved token to request LogShare.CN and clears local history after success.
remoteLogs.successDesc: Local history has also been cleared.

webdav.title: WebDAV Sync
webdav.configuredDesc: Remote endpoint configured. Sync Library favorites and back up local skin assets.
webdav.unconfiguredDesc: Configure WebDAV address, account, and sync content. https:// defaults to 443, http:// defaults to 80.
webdav.manageBackupsDesc: Download or delete save backups and skin backups stored on WebDAV.
webdav.connectionDesc: The WebDAV address is used as the PiLauncherSync root. Empty credentials use anonymous access.
webdav.addressProtocolError: Enter a WebDAV address starting with http:// or https://.
webdav.autoSyncIntervalDesc: Time interval to automatically sync and back up local data in the background.
webdav.backupDesc: Choose the local data to sync to WebDAV. Disabled items are skipped during manual sync.
webdav.operationDesc: Uses append-only operation logs with offline replay across devices.
webdav.skinBackupDesc: Creates a snapshot backup of local config/skins and restores it when the remote copy is newer.
webdav.saveBackupDesc: Mirrors marked local backups/saves folders to WebDAV as loose files and restores them locally with rollback when two-way sync is enabled.
webdav.saveBackupModeBackupDesc: Only upload marked local save backups. Remote data will never overwrite local backups.
webdav.saveBackupModeSyncDesc: Upload local changes and allow newer remote backups to restore locally.
webdav.noItemsEnabled: Enable at least one WebDAV sync item.
webdav.favoriteResult: Library: uploaded {{uploaded}} operations, downloaded {{downloaded}} operations, rebuilt {{favorites}} favorites from {{total}} operations, snapshot {{snapshot}}, compacted {{compacted}} old operations.
webdav.skinResult: Skin assets: {{action}}, uploaded {{uploaded}} files, downloaded {{downloaded}} files, local {{local}} files, remote {{remote}} files.
webdav.saveBackupResult: Save backups: {{action}}, verification {{verified}}, uploaded {{uploaded}} files, downloaded {{downloaded}} files, local {{localBackups}} backups/{{local}} files, remote {{remoteBackups}} backups/{{remote}} files.

about.productDesc: Cross-platform Minecraft Launcher optimized for Gamepad and Handhelds.
about.thanksDesc: Because of your support, PiLauncher can continue to improve. You can sponsor us via AfDian above.

github.title: Project GitHub
github.desc: Open source, PRs and Issues welcome

bilibili.title: Author Bilibili
bilibili.desc: Follow the author for development updates

openSource.title: Open Source Projects
openSource.headline: Major open source projects used by PiLauncher
openSource.description: This list contains {{count}} direct dependencies and ecosystem projects, excluding transitive lockfile dependencies.

update.title: New Version Available
update.notice: Click "Update Now" to download and install automatically. The launcher will restart after installation.
update.flatpakNotice: This Flatpak build does not support in-app update downloads. Please update PiLauncher from Discover or Flathub.

tagFilterModal.title: Tag Filter
tagFilterModal.description: Select tags below to filter the instance list.

step1.title: Import local modpack
step1.autoPrepare: Metadata and runtime requirements will be prepared automatically.

warning.autoRestore: Missing runtimes and referenced mods will be restored automatically during import.

errors.unsupportedArchive: Please select a supported archive: .zip, .mrpack, or .pipack.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe
wardrobe.emptyAccount: Please add a game account in settings first.

skinMenu.applySkinHint: Apply to switch to this skin.
skinMenu.noteDescription: When set, this note replaces the card title.
skinMenu.onlineProfileNote: This is the online active profile skin. It can be previewed and model-switched only.
skinMenu.activeLibraryNote: Active library skin cannot be deleted.

capeMenu.applyCapeHint: Are you sure you want to equip this cape?

directory.title: Initialize Data Directory
directory.desc1: We need a dedicated folder to store your game cores and instances.
directory.desc2: It can be a <1>brand new empty directory</1>, or an <3>existing PiLauncher legacy directory</3> to restore data.
directory.desc3: Please note: The path must absolutely NOT contain non-ASCII characters!
directory.placeholder: Please click browse to select an ASCII-only directory ->

java.title: No Java Environment Detected
java.desc1: We noticed that Java does not seem to be installed on your computer.
java.desc2: Please select the Minecraft version you want to play, and we will automatically download and configure the corresponding runtime for you.
java.skip: Skip, I will install manually later

steam.title: Steam Library Integration
steam.desc1: Detecting if Steam exists on your system.
steam.desc2: Would you like to register PiLauncher as a non-Steam game to launch it directly from your library or Big Picture mode?
steam.success: Registration successful! Please restart Steam for the shortcut to take effect.
steam.gamepadModeDesc: Detected that you are currently in Gaming Mode. Would you like to launch in Fullscreen (Gamepad) mode by default and exit the application when the Gamepad UI is closed?

legal.title: End User License Agreement
legal.subtitle: To continue using PiLauncher, you must read and agree to the following terms
legal.updateWarning: Due to changes in the EULA or Privacy Policy, you must read and agree again before continuing.
legal.agree: I have read and fully agree

exit.title: Confirm Exit
exit.headline: Exit PiLauncher
exit.description: The close button is set to "Exit Application". Confirming will immediately terminate the app process.

toolbar.deployDisabled: No cross-version tracking data is ready for this mod set

empty.loadingDesc: Reading favorites, tags, and mod sets.
empty.noMatchDesc: Try another keyword, type, or collection filter.
empty.emptyDesc: Search resources in Downloads and favorite them to see them here.
empty.actionDownloadDesc: Search and favorite resources from Downloads

tagModal.title: Add Tags
tagModal.hint: Select tags to associate with this resource.
tagModal.empty: No tags yet. Create tags in the sidebar first.

deleteFavorite.title: Remove Favorite
deleteFavorite.desc: "{{title}}" will be removed from favorites. If it also exists in tags or mod sets, it will be removed from those collections as well.

deleteModSet.title: Delete Mod Set
deleteModSet.desc: Mod set "{{name}}" and its cross-version tracking records will be deleted.
deleteModSet.removeMods: Also remove selected mods from favorites
deleteModSet.removeDesc: When off, only the mod set is deleted. When on, checked mods will also be removed from All Favorites, tags, and other collections.
deleteModSet.empty: No mods to remove from this mod set.

backup.importDone: Import complete: {{starred}} favorites, {{collections}} collections, and {{relations}} relations added.
backup.webdavMissingAddress: WebDAV address is not configured. Go to Settings - Data first.
backup.webdavSyncDisabled: Library favorites sync is disabled. Enable it in WebDAV settings first.

sidebar.duplicateTag: A tag with this name already exists

metadata.title: Edit {{type}}
metadata.name: Name
metadata.hint: Rename it or click the icon on the left to change the cover.
metadata.hintModSet: Rename it or click the icon on the left to change the cover. Cross-version tracking can also be edited here.
metadata.trackingDesc: Changing this clears current matches and checks all mods against the new target environment.

cloud.title: Library Cloud Sync
cloud.description: Local backups remain available. WebDAV provides an explicit sync entry for consolidating multi-device state.
cloud.emptyHistory: No manual sync records yet. The first WebDAV sync will appear here.

importPreview.title: Import Library
importPreview.description: Import merges into the current Library and does not clear existing data.

tracker.title: Mod Set Cross-Version Tracking ({{count}})
tracker.empty: No trackable mod sets yet. Favorite resources in bulk from Downloads and enable version tracking first.
tracker.notReadyWarning: This tracker is not fully ready. Only mods with matched versions will be installed.
tracker.createNewDesc: Automatically create an MC / Loader instance using the tracking target.

shareDialog.title: Share Logs
shareDialog.uploadInfo: Ready to upload {{count}} lines of logs. Size validation and optional sanitization will be performed.
shareDialog.sanitizeDesc: Replaces common tokens, auth headers, and local paths.
shareDialog.aiDesc: Fetch AI diagnosis after upload. May take longer.
shareDialog.historyInfo: Remote deletion credentials saved. Expiration will be tracked.

launchAnimation.killWarnDesc: Force closing the process may corrupt the current world save or cause data loss. Use only if the game is completely unresponsive.

sidebar.title: Console & Logs
sidebar.pipelineWait: Establishing log pipeline & starting VM, please wait...
sidebar.killWarnDesc: Force closing the process may corrupt the current world save or cause data loss. Use only if the game is completely unresponsive.
